/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -dynamiclib -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -current_version 0.15.1 -o ../../../../../bin/libggml-blas.0.15.1.dylib -install_name @rpath/libggml-blas.0.dylib "CMakeFiles/ggml-blas.dir/ggml-blas.cpp.o"  -Wl,-rpath,/Users/mac/lhm/build_check/bin ../../../../../bin/libggml-base.0.15.1.dylib -framework Accelerate
